titleStmt.title: SII 27.196: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 196. (A.R. No. 283 of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab standing in the temple of Siddhēśvara.

This record registers a gift of land, after purchase, for feeding brāhmaṇas on certain occasions and for other services in the temple of Siddhanāthadēva by Toḷahara-baḷiya Māḷacha-seṭṭi, son of Chavalada Saṅkuseṭṭi of Maṇigāra-kēri, when Kare Ellappa-voḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya under instructions from Sadāśivarāya-nāyaka of Keḷadi.
It is dated Śaka (1485-1486 current), Rudhirōdgāri, Bhādrapada śu. 12, Sravaṇa-dvādaśi corresponding to 1563 A.D., August 30. The week day was Monday and the nakshatra Śravaṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrī gurubhyō namaḥ śrī
sarasvatyē namaḥ nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁ
dra cāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē(ḥ) . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavaruśa 1485 saṁdu Arane varttamā
na rudhirōdgāri saṁvacharada bhādrapada śudha śravaṇadvadaśi
puṁṇyakāladalū śrīmaṁmahārājādhirāja rāja paramē
śvara śrī vīrapratāpa sadāsivarāya mahārāyaru vijeyanaga
riya siṁhāsanadalli kuḷitu sakalavaṁrna dharṁmaśramaṁgaḷanu
pratipālisuva kāladali keḷadiya sadāśivarāya nāyka Ayya
navara nirūpadiṁda kere Ellappavoḍeyaru bārakūra siṁhāsana
dalu kuḷitu rājyavanāḷuva kāladali maṇigārakēriya cava
lada saṁkuseṭṭiya maga toḷahara baḷiya māḷaca seṭṭiyu
śrīsidhanātha dēvara saṁnidhiyalū māḍida dharmakke barasi na
ṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare śrīsidhanātha dēvarali nityasthi
ti naḍava Ēkādaśi jāgarakke Amāvāse dvādaśi catrakke śiva
rātri dharṁmake sahā bāḷukacura voḷage Ā bāḷa catusī
meya vivara muḍalū hasakēriya vināyakadēvara gaḍi si
ddha nātha dēvara tōṭada gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalū
ṁra tōṭada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalū paḍuvalū
koṭekēriya paṁcaliṁga dēvara kaṭṭina kaḷada bāḷagaḍiyi
ṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalū sidanāthadēvara tōṭada gaḍiyi
ṁdaṁ teṁkalū yiṁtī catusīmeya voḷage Uḷa bāḷanū
māḷacaseṭṭiyā śrī siddhanāthadēvara kaya taṁtrada
halara kayalū Arthaparichyēdavāgi koṭṭu mūla pa
richyēdavāgi koṁḍa bāḷige Aramanege teruva terdu
kāla 1 kke varaha ga 29 A bāḷamēle siddhanātha dē
varige dēvasvakāla 1 ke naḍava Akkimuḍi 10 Ubha
yaṁ teru dēvasva kaḷadu śudha naḍava Akki nāghaṁḍuga
dalu kāla 1 kke muḍi 28 Akṣaradalū yippatta
Eṁṭu muḍi Akki voḷage dharmakke biṭṭa vivara ni
tya sthiti jāgarake kāla 1 kke vōduva Atage Akkimuḍi
6 Artava hēḷuvage Akki muḍi 6 dēvara nevēdyakke Akki
muḍi 1 paṁṇyakke Akki muḍi 1 huvige Akki muḍi 3 dī
pta Eṇṇege Akkimuḍi 1 Aṁtu jāgarakke Akkimuḍi 1 nitya
dvādase catrauṁba jana 6 Amāvāse dharmakke Uṁbaja
na 1 pradōṣakke Uṁbaja 2 Aṁttu tiṁgaḷu 1 kke
Uṁba jana 15 kke hāne 15 Alke
1 ke Akkimuḍi 4 ga śivarātri pūjegū Ā
braṁ janakkekamu 8 Aṁtu kālavoṁ
dake Akkimu 28 yi Akkiyanu Ā caṁdrārkkavāgi
naḍavadare māḍida darmakke vanoba Aḷupida
kavileya koṁda dōśakke
hōharu .
Digital edition of SII 27.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
